profile.name: Yvonne Valerie
profile.title: 1st Year BS Information Technology Student
profile.tagline: Aspiring Web Developer and UI Designer

about.description: Hi! I'm Yvonne Valerie, a first-year BS Information Technology student at Lorma Colleges. I am currently learning HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Java, GitHub, and Figma. I enjoy creating responsive websites, designing simple user interfaces, and building programming projects that help improve my skills. My goal is to become a skilled web developer and continue learning new technologies.

education.school: Dr. Quintin Balcita Sr. National High School

education.course: Bachelor of Science in Information Technology

projects.title: IUUX PROJECT
projects.description: responsive hotel and restaurant website designed in Figma and developed using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and JSON. The website features a modern user interface with room reservations, QR code functionality, chatbot support, notifications, customer reviews, reservation management, cancellation, and responsive layouts to provide a better user experience.

projects.title: HANGMAN GAME
projects.description: A Java-based Hangman game developed for my Computer Programming 2 course. Players guess the hidden word one letter at a time before running out of attempts. The game includes score tracking, random word selection, and demonstrates object-oriented programming concepts in Java.

projects.title: BANK PROJECT
projects.description: A Java-based Bank Management System developed as my COMPRO2 Final Project. It demonstrates object-oriented programming, account management, and banking operations.
